## Destructive one-time reset

Before installing, export any chat history that must be kept.

Opening this production update performs Android's **Clear storage** operation once. It erases the app's existing chats, app-managed attachments and backups, pairing credentials, settings, runtime permissions, notifications, and persisted URI access. Android closes the app during the reset; open it again to complete fresh setup and pairing.

The browser's separate local cache is not erased by installing this Android update.
